untested_failure_modes.description: Browser composition events interfere with isComposing state
untested_failure_modes.evidence: Complex composition handling in MessageInput.tsx lines 69-75
untested_failure_modes.user_impact: Typing feels erratic, unexpected command sending
untested_failure_modes.test_gap: No real browser composition event testing

untested_failure_modes.description: WebSocket reconnection creates duplicate event handlers
untested_failure_modes.user_impact: Commands execute multiple times after network issues

untested_failure_modes.description: Messages leak between different Claude instances
untested_failure_modes.evidence: Instance switching logic with shared WebSocket handlers

untested_failure_modes.description: Async state updates create race conditions with user input
untested_failure_modes.evidence: Multiple useState calls in rapid succession
untested_failure_modes.user_impact: UI state out of sync with actual behavior

high_probability_root_causes.description: MessageInput adds \n, then sendInput adds \n, causing double execution
high_probability_root_causes.user_symptom_match: Every keystroke feels like hitting enter
high_probability_root_causes.fix_prediction: Remove one of the newline injections

high_probability_root_causes.description: Event handlers accumulate without proper cleanup on instance switch
code_evidence: Lines 589-593: Disconnection logic may not clear all handlers
Lines 95-123: Handler setup without corresponding teardown verification
high_probability_root_causes.fix_prediction: Add explicit handler cleanup on instance switch

high_probability_root_causes.description: Deduplication fails due to timing window in message ID generation
code_evidence: Line 98: messageId includes timestamp that may differ for rapid messages
high_probability_root_causes.fix_prediction: Use content-based deduplication instead of timestamp

recommended_testing_strategies.description: Use Playwright to simulate real user typing with composition events
recommended_testing_strategies.implementation: Record actual user sessions, replay with timing accuracy

recommended_testing_strategies.description: Test with network interruptions, delays, and reconnections
recommended_testing_strategies.implementation: Use network throttling and connection drops during tests

recommended_testing_strategies.description: Test instance switching and concurrent operations
recommended_testing_strategies.implementation: Spawn multiple instances, switch rapidly, send concurrent commands

recommended_testing_strategies.description: Trace complete message flow from UI to WebSocket
recommended_testing_strategies.implementation: Add logging at every transformation point, verify single execution
